category_sources: Official chezmoi documentation says it helps manage personal configuration files across multiple machines.
source_facts.description says chezmoi manages dotfiles across multiple diverse machines securely.
display_name_sources: Official documentation page uses lowercase chezmoi as the project title.
docs_sources: Official chezmoi site includes quick start, user guide, reference, and extensive documentation links.
source_facts.homepage points to the official chezmoi documentation site.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/twpayne/chezmoi, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official chezmoi docs describe templates, password manager support, encryption, and scripts.
source_facts.description mentions dotfiles, multiple machines, and secure management.
